elasticmapreduce.cluster.ebsconfiguratio: `EbsConfiguration` is a subproperty of `InstanceFleetConfig` or `InstanceGroupConfig`. `EbsConfiguration` determines the EBS volumes to attach to EMR cluster instances.

elasticmapreduce.cluster.ebsconfiguratio.Description: An array of Amazon EBS volume specifications attached to a cluster instance.
Indicates whether an Amazon EBS volume is EBS-optimized.
